prompt:
A clean premium wellness-brand PRODUCT SHOT on a PURE WHITE background, 1:1 square composition, 4K resolution. Hero product photography style with simple how-to elements. Generous breathing room.

HERO SUBJECT — centered: photorealistic rendering of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, front label fully legible, gold lid). TWO dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES placed carefully in front of the jar at its base (representing the daily dose).

FLOATING ELEMENTS — minimal supporting callouts:
  • TOP — large bold ALL-CAPS headline in deep ink-black: '2 GUMMIES. EVERY DAY.' (bold condensed display sans-serif). A thin gold rule beneath. Tiny sub-line below: 'That's the whole routine.'
  • Around the jar — three small chip-style routine callouts (one upper-left, one upper-right, one lower-right), each with a tiny flat teal icon and short ALL-CAPS bold label:
     – upper-left: SUNRISE icon + 'MORNING OR ANYTIME'
     – upper-right: WATER GLASS icon + 'WITH WATER'
     – lower-right: CALENDAR icon + 'DAILY HABIT'
  • BELOW the jar — a thin gold dotted timeline strip with four small milestone labels: 'DAY 1 · WEEK 1 · WEEK 2-4 · 4 WEEKS+' under tiny sub-labels in light-gray ('First taste · Improved digestion · Energy + glow · Sustained vitality').

BOTTOM — tiny tagline in tracked light-gray all-caps: 'TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE'.

DESIGN SYSTEM:
  • Background: pure clean white with very subtle warm-gray paper texture.
  • Accent colors: muted TEAL/CYAN, warm GOLD/YELLOW, deep INK-BLACK type, warm-gray sub-text.
  • Typography: bold ALL-CAPS condensed display sans-serif for headlines/labels, clean modern sans-serif for body. NO script fonts.
  • Icons: tiny flat outlined single-color teal/cyan.
  • Mood: editorial wellness-brand hero shot — Athletic Greens / Hims / Apple product-page aesthetic.

ABSOLUTE RULES:
  • All text MUST be cleanly spelled, no garbled letters, no AI-text artifacts.
  • 1:1 square, 4K, pure white background, NO border, NO frame.
  • Reference the provided image for brand color/type and jar appearance.
